SourceProxy.name: SHYXSelectionFillAlphaReunionFilter
SourceProxy.label: SHYX Selection: Fill, Alpha Wrap, Union

Documentation.short_help: Split by selection, hole-fill both, Alpha wrap selection, then CGAL union.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Splits the surface into the selected and unselected regions, fills boundary holes (CGAL) on each part, runs Alpha Wrapping on the selected part (CGAL 5.5+), and merges the two closed-oriented surfaces with a CGAL PMP boolean union. When the unselected part is empty (entire surface selected), only the selected path is output. Use Selection on port 1, or a cell data mask (SelectionCellArrayName) like other SHYX selection tools.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.label: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Cells to treat as the region that is hole-filled and Alpha-wrapped; the complement is hole-filled and then unioned.

StringVectorProperty.name: SelectionCellArrayName
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Optional: when Selection is not connected, name of a cell data array on the mesh. Same rule as SHYX Delete Selected Cells: integral non-zero or float > 0.5 selects a cell.

IntVectorProperty.name: FairingContinuity
IntVectorProperty.label: Fairing (hole fill)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Continuity for CGAL hole fill on both sub-meshes (0 / 1 / 2), same as SHYX Hole Fill.

IntVectorProperty.name: SkipAlphaWrapping
IntVectorProperty.label: Skip Alpha wrap (selected only)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If on, the selected part is only hole-filled (no Alpha Wrapping).

IntVectorProperty.name: AbsoluteThresholds
IntVectorProperty.label: Alpha wrap: absolute Alpha/Offset
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If off, Alpha and Offset are percentages of the mesh length (see VESPA Alpha Wrapping).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Alpha
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Alpha
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Alpha wrap parameter (maximum circumradius of faces in the result).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Offset
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Offset
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Alpha wrap offset (dilatation / shrink factor depending on context).

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes (from full input)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Probe the original full surface onto the merged result.
